title: sorocea subumbellata
intro: Sorocea subumbellata, also known as the Chilean sorocea, is a species of plant in the family Moraceae, native to South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Sorocea subumbellata include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and support immune function. Sorocea subumbellata can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat various ailments.
